evidence: standards/enterprise/privacy-compliance.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: Additional data requires a specific human-approved purpose, field-level necessity, DATA-CLASS-001 class, recipient and retention scope, owner, expiry, and removal plan.
statement: Products collect, process, disclose, and retain only the minimum fields, recipients, precision, and duration necessary for a declared owned purpose and do not retain data for speculative future use.
